parameters.subject: ={{ 'Welcome to ' + ($json.body?.tenant_name || $json.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay') + ' - Access Your Account' }}
parameters.html:
=

Welcome to {{ $json.body?.tenant_name || $json.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay' }}

Dear {{ $json.body?.recipient?.name || $json.recipient?.name || $json.body?.resident_name || $json.resident_name || 'Valued Resident' }},

Welcome to {{ $json.body?.tenant_name || $json.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay' }}! We're excited to have you join our community management platform.

Click the button below to access your account. This magic link will automatically log you in - no password required!

Access Your Account

What you can do:

  • View and pay your invoices online
  • Access community documents and announcements
  • Update your contact information
  • Stay informed about community events

If the button doesn't work, you can copy and paste this magic link into your browser:

{{ $json.body?.magic_link || $json.magic_link || $json.body?.login_link || $json.login_link }}

Note: This magic link will expire in 7 days and can only be used once for security.

This is an automated message from {{ $json.body?.tenant_name || $json.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay' }}. Please do not reply to this email.

Best regards,
{{ $json.body?.tenant_name || $json.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay' }} Management Team

This is an automated message. Please do not reply to this email.

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Your NeibrPay Verification Code from: ' + ($json.body.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay') }}
parameters.html:
={{ '

Verification Code

' + ($json.body.user_name ? 'Hello ' + $json.body.user_name + ',' : 'Hello,') + '

Your verification code is:

' + ($json.body.code || $json.code) + '

This code expires in ' + ($json.body.expires_in_minutes || $json.expires_in_minutes || 15) + ' minutes.

This is an automated message from ' + ($json.body.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay') + '. Please do not reply to this email.

Best regards,
' + ($json.body.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay') + ' Management

' }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Invoice ' + ($json.body?.invoice_summary?.invoice_number || '') + ' from ' + ($json.body?.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay') }}

=

Invoice {{ $json.body && $json.body.invoice_summary && $json.body.invoice_summary.invoice_number || '' }}

Please find your invoice details below from {{ $json.body && $json.body.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay' }}.

Invoice Number: {{ $json.body && $json.body.invoice_summary && $json.body.invoice_summary.invoice_number || 'N/A' }}
Unit: {{ $json.body && $json.body.invoice_summary && $json.body.invoice_summary.unit_title || 'N/A' }}
Address: {{ $json.body && $json.body.invoice_summary && $json.body.invoice_summary.unit_address || 'N/A' }}
Total Amount: ${{ $json.body && $json.body.invoice_summary && $json.body.invoice_summary.total || '0.00' }}
Balance Due: ${{ $json.body && $json.body.invoice_summary && $json.body.invoice_summary.balance_due || '0.00' }}
Due Date: {{ $json.body && $json.body.invoice_summary && $json.body.invoice_summary.due_date || 'N/A' }}
View & Pay Invoice

If the button doesn't work, you can copy and paste this link into your browser:

{{ $json.body && $json.body.magic_link || $json.magic_link }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '✅ Payment Approved - Invoice #' + ($json.body?.invoice_number || 'N/A') + ' from ' + ($json.body?.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay') }}
parameters.html:
=

✅ Payment Approved!

Dear {{ $json.body?.recipient?.name || $json.body?.resident_name || 'Valued Resident' }},

We're pleased to inform you that your payment has been successfully approved and processed!

Invoice Number: {{ $json.body?.invoice_number || 'N/A' }}
Payment Amount: {{ $json.body?.currency || '$' }}{{ ($json.body?.amount || 0) }}
Payment Method: {{ $json.body?.payment_method || 'N/A' }}
Payment Date: {{ $json.body?.payment_date || 'N/A' }}
Invoice Status: PAID ✓
{{ ($json.body?.public_comment ? '

📝 Admin Note:

' + $json.body.public_comment + '

' : '') }}
View Dashboard

Thank you! We appreciate your prompt payment. Your account is now up to date.

{{ $json.body?.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay' }} Management Team

parameters.subject: ={{ '📋 Payment Submitted for Review - Invoice #' + ($json.body?.invoice_number || 'N/A') + ' from ' + ($json.body?.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay') }}
parameters.html:
=

📋 Payment Submitted for Review

Hello Admin Team,

A resident has submitted a payment for review. Please review the payment details below and take appropriate action.

Invoice Number: {{ $json.body?.invoice_number || 'N/A' }}
Submitted By: {{ $json.body?.resident_name || 'N/A' }}
Resident Email: {{ $json.body?.resident_email || 'N/A' }}
Payment Amount: {{ $json.body?.currency || '$' }}{{ ($json.body?.amount || 0) }}
Payment Method: {{ $json.body?.payment_method || 'N/A' }}
Payment Date: {{ $json.body?.payment_date || 'N/A' }}
Status: ⏳ PENDING REVIEW

⚠️ Action Required:

Please review this payment submission and approve or reject it. The resident is waiting for your response.

Review Payment & Invoice

If the button doesn't work, you can copy and paste this link into your browser:

{{ $json.body?.invoice_link || ($json.body?.frontend_url || 'https://app.neibrpay.com') + '/invoices/' + ($json.body?.invoice_id || '') }}

This is an automated notification from {{ $json.body?.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay' }}. Please do not reply to this email.

Best regards,
{{ $json.body?.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay' }} System

This is an automated message. Please do not reply to this email.

parameters.subject: ={{ '❌ Payment Review: Changes Needed - Invoice #' + ($json.body?.invoice_number || 'N/A') + ' from ' + ($json.body?.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay') }}
parameters.html:
=

❌ Payment Changes Needed

Dear {{ $json.body?.recipient?.name || $json.body?.resident_name || 'Valued Resident' }},

Your payment submission for Invoice #{{ $json.body?.invoice_number || 'N/A' }} has been reviewed, and we need you to make some changes before it can be approved.

📝 Reason for Changes:

{{ $json.body?.rejection_reason || $json.body?.public_comment || 'No reason provided' }}

Original Payment Details:

Amount: {{ $json.body?.currency || '$' }}{{ ($json.body?.amount || 0) }}
Payment Method: {{ $json.body?.payment_method || 'N/A' }}
Payment Date: {{ $json.body?.payment_date || 'N/A' }}

📌 What You Need to Do:

  1. Review the reason for changes above
  2. Make the necessary corrections to your payment information
  3. Resubmit your payment for review
Resubmit Payment

Questions? Please contact the {{ $json.body?.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay' }} administrator for assistance.

This is an automated message from {{ $json.body?.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay' }}. Please do not reply to this email.

Best regards,
{{ $json.body?.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay' }} Management Team

parameters.subject: ={{ '✅ Invoice Paid - Thank You! Invoice #' + ($json.body?.invoice_number || 'N/A') + ' from ' + ($json.body?.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay') }}
parameters.html:
=

✅ Invoice Paid - Thank You!

Dear {{ $json.body?.recipient?.name || $json.body?.resident_name || 'Valued Resident' }},

We're pleased to inform you that Invoice #{{ $json.body?.invoice_number || 'N/A' }} has been paid in full!

🙏 Thank You for Your Payment!

We sincerely appreciate your prompt payment. Your account is now up to date.

Invoice Number: {{ $json.body?.invoice_number || 'N/A' }}
Invoice Total: {{ $json.body?.currency || '$' }}{{ ($json.body?.invoice_total || $json.body?.amount || 0) }}
Payment Amount: {{ $json.body?.currency || '$' }}{{ ($json.body?.amount || 0) }}
Payment Method: {{ $json.body?.payment_method || 'N/A' }}
Payment Date: {{ $json.body?.payment_date || 'N/A' }}
Status: PAID ✓

Your timely payment helps us maintain our community services and facilities.
We truly value your commitment to our community!

View Your Account

This is an automated message from {{ $json.body?.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay' }}. Please do not reply to this email.

{{ $json.body?.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay' }} Management Team

parameters.subject:
=  {{ (($json.body?.reminder_phase || $json.reminder_phase) === 'post_due'
    ? 'Overdue Reminder (' + ($json.body?.days_overdue || $json.days_overdue || 0) + ' day' + ((($json.body?.days_overdue || $json.days_overdue || 0) == 1) ? '' : 's') + '): Invoice '
    : 'Payment Reminder (' + ($json.body?.days_until_due || $json.days_until_due || 0) + ' day' + ((($json.body?.days_until_due || $json.days_until_due || 0) == 1) ? '' : 's') + ' left): Invoice ')
+ ($json.body?.invoice_summary?.invoice_number || $json.invoice_summary?.invoice_number || '')
+ ' from '
+ ($json.body?.tenant_name || $json.tenant_name || 'NeibrPay') }}
parameters.html:
=

Already paid? If you have already submitted payment, please contact your HOA manager {{ ($json.body?.cc && $json.body.cc[0]) ? 'at ' + $json.body.cc[0] + '' : 'using the contact information provided by your community' }}.

{{ ($json.body?.reminder_phase || $json.reminder_phase) === 'post_due' ? 'Overdue Reminder' : 'Payment Reminder' }}

Invoice {{ $json.body?.invoice_summary?.invoice_number || $json.invoice_summary?.invoice_number || '' }}

Dear {{ $json.body?.recipient?.name || $json.recipient?.name || 'Valued Resident' }},

{{ ($json.body?.reminder_phase || $json.reminder_phase) === 'post_due' ? 'This is a reminder that your invoice is now overdue.' : 'This is a friendly reminder that your invoice is coming due soon.' }}

{{ ($json.body?.reminder_phase || $json.reminder_phase) === 'post_due' ? 'Days overdue: ' + ($json.body?.days_overdue || $json.days_overdue || 0) : 'Days until due: ' + ($json.body?.days_until_due || $json.days_until_due || 0) }}

Invoice Number: {{ $json.body?.invoice_summary?.invoice_number || 'N/A' }}
Unit: {{ $json.body?.invoice_summary?.unit_title || 'N/A' }}
Address: {{ $json.body?.invoice_summary?.unit_address || 'N/A' }}
Total Amount: ${{ $json.body?.invoice_summary?.total || '0.00' }}
Balance Due: ${{ $json.body?.invoice_summary?.balance_due || '0.00' }}
Due Date: {{ $json.body?.invoice_summary?.due_date || 'N/A' }}
{{ ($json.body?.late_fee_notice || $json.late_fee_notice) ? `

Late fee notice: ${($json.body?.late_fee_notice || $json.late_fee_notice)?.text || 'A late fee may apply based on your HOA policy.'}

` : '' }}
